3160560.name: Tale Smiths
3160560.description:
Discover the rich cultural heritage of Northern Europe in Tale Smiths, a narrative-driven adventure that blends immersive storytelling with literary tourism. Step into tales shaped by the traditions, poetry, music, and folklore of Finland, Sweden, Norway, Ireland, and the Faroe Islands.

Every story is crafted in collaboration with local experts, ensuring an authentic connection to each region’s culture. Explore beautifully recreated 3D environments built with photogrammetry and drone imaging, meet lifelike characters brought to life with motion capture, and interact with the world through innovative camera-based motion controls.

Whether wandering through legendary landscapes, listening to traditional songs, or uncovering hidden literary gems, Tale Smiths offers an engaging journey where culture and technology meet.

Key Features

  • Cultural Storytelling: Play through interactive stories inspired by local literature and folklore.

  • Authentic Heritage: Experience poetry, songs, music, and traditions seamlessly woven into gameplay.

  • Realistic Worlds: Explore detailed 3D environments based on authentic landscapes.

  • Immersive Technology: Control characters with your movements using camera-based motion tracking.

  • Literary Tourism Reimagined: Travel across five regions through the power of stories.

Tale Smiths is both a game and a cultural journey — an interactive story collection that invites players to experience the living literature of Northern Europe.
